text.title: tracker-ai-triage-classify-route Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tracker-ai-triage-classify-route as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Skip dedupe entirely "because the team will catch duplicates manually".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inbound duplicate rate at scale is 15-25%; manual catch happens after the engineer has read the issue, defeating the cost saving the triage agent was supposed to deliver.

failure-mode.description: Agent posts the classification only in the issue body via edits, not as a comment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The body has no per-row reaction surface; the assignee can only dispute by replying with prose, which the agent cannot programmatically parse.
